behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the TS4023 wrapper scenario, all three affected packages, docs unchanged via build, and unit tests for blocker — matching instruction scope.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names grouped by package and concern, each with docstrings explaining pass_to_pass vs fail_to_pass.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code-only, not producing structured data.
